reviews.review_title: VR Game You Didn’t Know You Needed
reviews.review_description:
Taxi Driver VR is one of those VR games that instantly clicks. It’s extremely easy to learn, so you’re having fun almost immediately without long tutorials or confusion. The graphics are clean, colorful, and surprisingly polished, with great character models full of personality. The world feels alive and highly interactive — passengers react to almost everything you do, which leads to constant unexpected and hilarious moments. There are tons of objects you can use to interact with passengers, and the number of possible reactions makes every ride feel different. The characters are funny, expressive, and often ridiculous in the best way. Overall, it’s a very light, joyful, and genuinely funny game that keeps you smiling the entire time and makes you want to jump back in “just for one more ride.”

P.S. Cow is the best 🐄

This game's so entertaining, it really is, buy it if you have a sense of humour. I see there's a few people complaining about it not being suitable for kids. Well, firstly, kids can't order here without a bank card/paypal or if they're given vouchers but overall it's the parent's responsibility to parent their own kids and vet the games they play. I'm sick of parents complaining of their kids playing violent games and blaming everyone but themselves for their behaviour. Also, people are downmarking because you can't drive the car yourself. This is mentioned in the description of the game so it's unfair to mark down for this.
nice game

reviews.review_title: Great but really needs some major update
reviews.review_description: This game is one of those that you won’t expect to be good, but it is, I enjoy this game a lot, my friend actually likes it even more than I do. One thing we need though is definitely free drive, it would be so cool to just drive anywhere we want, maybe the passengers will say smth if we are going the wrong way. Also second, we need a LOT more items, like I mean an absolute INSANE amount cause when I got the game I unlocked and used everything in the first hour. And third, please add something where if your driving a passenger other orders can come through and you can have multiple people, it would be really cool if they can interact with each other as well.

This game is obviously were you are a taxi driver and you drive clients to new locations. Each client has unique behavior and react to a ton of things you do. No, you can’t drive the car, it moves for you tho you can steer it left and right but it will recenter. You can also use tons of different items. Each item is really fun and there’s a lot of them. But eventually you will get tired of driving the same people even those there are a lot of different characters. My opinion, fun but not worth $10.

This game is absolutely not appropriate, especially for children. It offers no educational or developmental value whatsoever. On the contrary, it promotes negative behaviors and sends the wrong messages.

The overall atmosphere and design of the game feel unhealthy and, at times, disturbing. Instead of providing a safe and constructive experience, it exposes players to content that can be harmful—particularly for younger audiences.

I strongly believe parents should be cautious about allowing their children to engage with this type of content. I do not recommend this game at all.
